title: Path to Self-Preservation and Well-Being
content:
By receiving Naamdaan from the powerful Saint Umakant Ji Maharaj and taking a solemn oath (sapath) to abstain permanently from alcohol, eggs, meat, non-vegetarian food, drugs, and all other intoxicating substances, and by worshipping the True Supreme God, one adopts a disciplined and righteous way of life.This spiritual path offers guidance, strength, and support to everyone, everywhere, regardless of circumstances—whether facing life-threatening diseases, war, poverty, or any form of crisis. Through sincere practice and faith, it helps individuals protect, transform, and uplift their lives.

Faith in the Divine Name:
In times of deep trouble—when no one seems able to help and all hope appears lost—people may sincerely chant and remember the divine name “Jaigurudev.” Devotees believe that this is the sacred name of the Supreme Lord, and through heartfelt faith and devotion, it provides inner strength, guidance, and unexpected help.This is the only name in this Yuga cycle that helps people in all kinds of difficulties. Today, people in India and 42 other countries are chanting and remembering this name.

Experiences and Testimonials of Faith:
According to followers and devotees, more than 200 million people have benefited from sincerely remembering and chanting the sacred name “Jaigurudev.” Many report that they applied this practice during personal hardships and experienced relief, protection, guidance, or positive transformation in their situations.
Devotees affirm that the Supreme Lord always listens to His children, and sincere remembrance of His sacred name invites divine grace, protection, and intervention in times of need.

title: The arrival of Satyug and change
content:
In this very year you will hear that compared to last year, earthquakes will occur more this year. The earth will shake. Big big buildings will collapse. In this very year you will hear that the earth itself cracked open. And smoke started coming out from the earth. What is meant by gubaar? Flames of fire started coming out.

Now you understand this: in this very year you will hear that, brother, heart attacks are happening a lot. New new diseases also, meaning understand that they may be heard of. Such a disease happened that one slept at night and did not see the morning. They ate, drank, kept talking, listened to and watched the news, and then slept and did not wake up. Such such incidents you will hear about, some people will also get to see them.

You need to understand, dear ones, not only this—fights and quarrels will also happen. There will be a lot of fighting. Where will it happen? It will happen in foreign countries. People will fight with one another. Those people who, for their honor, for the throne, for saving power, are doing violence and murder, or getting it done—you understand this, sin is being attached to them. And the punishment for sins will also be given to them.

Those who are getting violence and murder done, that place itself will not remain with them. In simple words understand that changes of power will also happen in many places. So power change will happen here as well, in your regions also, in the states of India also it can happen, brother.

title: Warning of the coming time
content:
The disease that will come in the future will not have any treatment with doctors. They will not be able to tell what kind of disease it is, because that disease will be of germs that will not be visible, and they will enter inside and make their home. And when they do their work, become active, they will fail the heart, fail the kidneys, and make the body useless. And writhing in pain, the way a fish writhes, in that way people will give up their lives.

So, to be saved from such diseases, the Name is the Sanjeevani herb.

title: Which countries will survive, and which will not remain on the world map?
content:
Only those countries will survive that know the great souls of India, that accept the words of those sages and saints who were and are the owners of this land. They will follow their teachings and spread them among their people. They will make their people vegetarian and free from intoxication. Only those countries will survive.

Those countries will not survive where the number of meat-eaters is greater, where the number of oppressors is greater, where the number of sinners is greater. Those countries will be erased from the world map. There will be no trace of their name or existence.

Right now, people are giving threats, saying, “We will erase you, we will erase you.” They are showing this to one another. But no one will be able to erase anyone. Whoever will be erased will be erased by their own sins. Because when the pot of sins becomes full, then it will burst on its own. Then they themselves will start facing trouble. Their own people will start killing them and chasing them away.

Such conditions are going to be created in foreign countries—fights for the chair and warnings of world war.

Dear ones, this will be a fight for chairs. It will be a fight for the throne. It will be a fight of ego. And in this itself, a world war will happen. The outline of a world war has already been made. It can start at any time. This is 2025. In 2026, there will be a very terrible war, in which atomic bombs and nuclear bombs can also be used. The greenery of this earth can be burned. The earth can be made barren. Such bad times can come.

Therefore, you people are being told that you should remain vegetarian, remain free from intoxication, and by chanting God’s name, make that Supreme Lord happy.

title: What kinds of hardships will arise in the year 2026:
content:
In this very year, you will hear that compared to last year, earthquakes will occur more. The earth will shake. Big buildings will collapse. In this same year, you will hear that the earth itself cracked open. And smoke started coming out of the earth. What is meant by gubaar? Flames and fire started coming out.

Now you should understand that in this same year you will hear that heart attacks are happening a lot. New diseases will also be heard of, meaning you can understand that such news will be heard. Such a disease occurred that one slept at night and did not see the morning. They ate, drank, talked, listened to and watched the news, and then slept and did not wake up. Such incidents you will hear about, and some people will also get to see them.

You need to understand, dear ones, not only this. Fights and quarrels will also happen. There will be a lot of fighting. Where will it happen? It will happen in foreign countries. People will fight with one another. Those people who, for their honor, for the throne, for saving power, are committing violence and murder, or getting it done—understand that sin is being attached to them. And they will also receive punishment for those sins.

Those who are getting violence and murders done, that place itself will not remain for them. In simple words, understand that there will be changes of power in many places. Power will change here as well, in your regions, in the states of India as well, brother.
